introSection: Rock 'n' Roller is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer I.E. Park currently located at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster was previously located at Blackgang Chine where it operated under the name Cliffhanger. It closed on 30 October 2022.

fullText:
Rock 'n' Roller is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer I.E. Park currently located at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, England, UK.

The coaster was previously located at Blackgang Chine where it operated under the name Cliffhanger. It closed on 30 October 2022.
